title: Cyrtochilum werneri
taxonomy: Cyrtochilum werneri is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. The genus Cyrtochilum is a part of the subtribe Cynochilinae, which is a group of orchids that are characterized by their long, thin flowers. Cyrtochilum werneri is native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions of the continent. The classification of Cyrtochilum werneri is further divided into the family Orchidaceae, order Asparagales, and class Liliopsida. This classification places Cyrtochilum werneri within the broader group of monocots and flowering plants.

intro: Cyrtochilum werneri, also known as Werner's Cyrtochilum, is a species of orchid native to South America. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may aid in wound healing and reduce pain.
